flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at York Technical College rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.0k → $8.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at York Technical College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $13.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at York Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at York Technical College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2k → 3.8k).
